title: Phase 11: Bridge/import engine backend - parsers, mapping, confidence scoring
description: Build the import engine backend: core import engine service, CSV/XLSX/PDF parsers, field mapping template service, confidence scoring engine, and import API routes.
steps: Create src/lib/bridge/import-engine.ts with import orchestration (file parsing, mapping, dedup, staging, approval)
Create src/lib/bridge/parsers/csv-parser.ts with CSV file parsing and column detection
Create src/lib/bridge/parsers/xlsx-parser.ts with XLSX file parsing and sheet selection
Create src/lib/bridge/parsers/pdf-parser.ts with PDF parsing via Claude AI extraction
Create src/lib/bridge/mapping-templates.ts with field mapping template management
Support saved templates per import type (customers, products, prices, POs, invoices)
Create src/lib/bridge/confidence.ts with confidence scoring engine
Score each row/field on match quality, flag low-confidence for manual review
Create src/app/api/imports/route.ts with import job management
Create src/app/api/imports/[id]/route.ts with import detail and row management
